attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SOXRS.BATCH_ID                      
,SOXRS.ACCOUNT_CLASS                 
,SOXRS.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT              
,SOXRS.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID            
,SOXRS.ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE          
,SOXRS.ADJUSTMENT_ACCOUNTING_ID      
,SOXRS.ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY           
,SOXRS.ADJUSTMENT_ID                 
,SOXRS.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID            
,SOXRS.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NUMBER        
,SOXRS.ADJUSTMENT_PCT_VALUE          
,SOXRS.ADJUSTMENT_PERCENT            
,SOXRS.AE_HEADER_ID                  
,SOXRS.AE_LINE_NUM                   
,SOXRS.AMOUNT                        
,SOXRS.APPLICATION_ID                
,SOXRS.ASSOCIATION_TYPE              
,SOXRS.BATCH_SOURCE                  
,SOXRS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           
,SOXRS.BOOKING_PERCENT               
,SOXRS.CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
,SOXRS.COGS_DEFERRAL_FLAG            
,SOXRS.COGS_REV_GL_DATE              
,SOXRS.COGS_REV_POSTED_DATE          
,SOXRS.CONCATENATED_SEGMENTS         
,SOXRS.CONVERSION_TYPE               
,SOXRS.CREATED_BY                    
,SOXRS.CREATION_DATE                 
,SOXRS.CURRENCY_CODE                 
,SOXRS.CURRENCY_PRECISION            
,SOXRS.CUSTOMER_NAME                 
,SOXRS.CUSTOMER_NUMBER               
,SOXRS.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID               
,SOXRS.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID          
,SOXRS.DESTINATION_BATCH_ID          
,SOXRS.DESTINATION_BATCH_NAME        
,SOXRS.DIST_BAL_TYPE                 
,SOXRS.DISTRIBUTION_TYPE             
,SOXRS.EDW_EXTRACTED_FLAG            
,SOXRS.EVENT_ID                      
,SOXRS.EVENT_TYPE                    
,SOXRS.EXCHANGE_DATE                 
,SOXRS.EXCHANGE_RATE                 
,SOXRS.GL_DATE                       
,SOXRS.GL_INTERFACE_ELIGIBLE         
,SOXRS.GL_POSTED_DATE                
,SOXRS.GL_POSTED_FLAG                
,SOXRS.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,SOXRS.GROUPING_ID                   
,SOXRS.HEADER_ID                     
,SOXRS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             
,SOXRS.INVOICE_AMOUNT                
,SOXRS.INVOICE_TYPE                  
,SOXRS.JE_CATEGORY_NAME              
,SOXRS.JE_SOURCE_NAME                
,SOXRS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,SOXRS.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,SOXRS.LEDGER_ID                     
,SOXRS.LINE_COGS_AMOUNT              
,SOXRS.LINE_ID                       
,SOXRS.LINE_TYPE       
,SOXRS.MERAKI_FLAG              
,SOXRS.OA_SKU_TYPE                   
,SOXRS.ORDER_NUMBER                  
,SOXRS.ORG_ID                        
,SOXRS.PERCENT_ADJ                   
,SOXRS.PERIOD_NAME                   
,SOXRS.PROCESS_ID                    
,SOXRS.PROFILE_ID                    
,SOXRS.RAO_CREATED_BY                
,SOXRS.RAO_CREATION_DATE             
,SOXRS.RAO_LAST_UPDATE_DATE          
,SOXRS.RAO_LAST_UPDATED_BY           
,SOXRS.RECOGNIZED_BOOKING_PCT        
,SOXRS.ROL_TRANSACTION_ID            
,SOXRS.SEGMENT1                      
,SOXRS.SEGMENT10                     
,SOXRS.SEGMENT2                      
,SOXRS.SEGMENT3                      
,SOXRS.SEGMENT4                      
,SOXRS.SEGMENT5                      
,SOXRS.SEGMENT6                      
,SOXRS.SEGMENT7                      
,SOXRS.SEGMENT8                      
,SOXRS.SEGMENT9                      
,SOXRS.SOURCE_BATCH_ID               
,SOXRS.SOURCE_BATCH_NAME             
,SOXRS.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5              
,SOXRS.SUMMARY_ID                    
,SOXRS.TRX_CLASS                     
,SOXRS.TRX_DATE                      
,SOXRS.TRX_NUMBER                    
,SOXRS.TSV_FLAG                      
,SOXRS.UNIQUE_ID                     
,SOXRS.USD_CONV_RATE                 
,SOXRS.WEBEX_FLAG                    
,SOXRS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME            
,SOXRS.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           
,SOXRS.ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_LINE_DTLS SOXRS
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SOXRS.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAA
  ON SOXRS.APPLICATION_ID = EFAA.APPLICATION_ID 
  AND UPPER(EFAA.APPLICATION_NAME) = 'REVENUE ACCOUNTING ENGINE'
 WHERE 1=1
  AND SOXRS.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL
  AND COALESCE(SOXRS.GL_POSTED_FLAG, 'N') = 'Y'
 AND NOT EXISTS
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_RAE_ADJSTMNT_GL_DSTRBTN WRAGD
  WHERE WRAGD.SK_SUMMARY_ID_INT = SOXRS.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
  AND WRAGD.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

SELECT RANK() OVER(
 ORDER BY NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, SOXRS.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID) + SRAGDKEY.MAX_VAL RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY,
   SOXRS.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID,
 NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 FROM 
 (
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SRAGD. RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
  
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_ADJSTMNT_GL_DSTRBTN SRAGD ) SRAGDKEY,
 (
 SELECT GLOBAL_NAME,ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID,APPLICATION_ID,GL_POSTED_FLAG,GL_POSTED_DATE,LEDGER_ID 
 FROM  $$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_LINE_DTLS) SOXRS
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SOXRS.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAA
  ON SOXRS.APPLICATION_ID = EFAA.APPLICATION_ID 
  AND UPPER(EFAA.APPLICATION_NAME) = 'REVENUE ACCOUNTING ENGINE'

WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER GL WHERE SOXRS.LEDGER_ID = GL.LEDGER_ID)
  AND SOXRS.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL
  AND COALESCE(SOXRS.GL_POSTED_FLAG, 'N') = 'Y'
AND
  NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_ADJSTMNT_GL_DSTRBTN SMATRX
    WHERE SMATRX.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    AND SMATRX.SK_SUMMARY_ID_INT = SOXRS.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID)

SELECT  
 SRAGD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY , 
 CASE WHEN SOXRS.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'C' AND SOXRS.ACCOUNT_CLASS IN  ('COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD','DEFERRED_COGS','UNEARNED_REVENUE','REVENUE') THEN 'CREDIT'
   WHEN SOXRS.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'D' AND SOXRS.ACCOUNT_CLASS IN  ('COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD','DEFERRED_COGS','UNEARNED_REVENUE','REVENUE') THEN 'DEBIT'
 ELSE 'UNK'
 END AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE,
 SOXRS.GL_DATE AS GL_DTM, 
 COALESCE(SOXRS.GL_POSTED_FLAG,'=') AS GL_POSTED_FLG, 
 COALESCE(SOXRS.DESTINATION_BATCH_ID,-999) AS JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_ID_INT, 
 COALESCE(SOXRS.JE_SOURCE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_NAME, 
 COALESCE(SOXRS.SEGMENT1,'020') COMPANY_CD, 
 NSOBT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
 COALESCE (USOBK.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY ,  
 SOXRS.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID AS SK_SUMMARY_ID_INT, 
 NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD, 
 CASE WHEN SOXRS.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'C' THEN COALESCE(SOXRS.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT,0) ELSE 0 END AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
 CASE WHEN SOXRS.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'C' THEN COALESCE(SOXRS.AMOUNT,0) ELSE 0 END AS RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
 CASE WHEN SOXRS.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'D' THEN COALESCE(SOXRS.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT,0) ELSE 0 END AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
 CASE WHEN SOXRS.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'D' THEN COALESCE(SOXRS.AMOUNT,0) ELSE 0 END AS RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM                , 
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER               , 
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM    ,             
 USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               , 
 'I' AS ACTION_CODE                  ,  
 'I' AS DML_TYPE                       
 FROM
 (SELECT 
  BATCH_ID                      
 ,ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID            
 ,ADJUSTMENT_ID                 
 ,ADJUSTMENT_ACCOUNTING_ID      
 ,ORG_ID                        
 ,APPLICATION_ID                
 ,LEDGER_ID                     
 ,CURRENCY_CODE                 
 ,EXCHANGE_RATE                 
 ,EXCHANGE_DATE                 
 ,CONVERSION_TYPE               
 ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE          
 ,GL_DATE                       
 ,AMOUNT                                    
 ,ACCOUNT_CLASS                 
 ,PERCENT_ADJ                   
 ,ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NUMBER        
 ,GL_POSTED_FLAG                                           
 ,EVENT_ID                      
 ,EVENT_TYPE                    
 ,CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
 ,SEGMENT1                      
 ,SEGMENT2                      
 ,SEGMENT3                      
 ,SEGMENT4                      
 ,SEGMENT5                      
 ,SEGMENT6                                          
 ,JE_CATEGORY_NAME              
 ,JE_SOURCE_NAME                
 ,PERIOD_NAME                   
 ,GL_POSTED_DATE                                        
 ,DESTINATION_BATCH_ID                                      
 ,GL_INTERFACE_ELIGIBLE         
 ,COGS_DEFERRAL_FLAG            
 ,COGS_REV_POSTED_DATE          
 ,COGS_REV_GL_DATE                                                                          
 ,CREATED_BY                    
 ,CREATION_DATE                 
 ,LAST_UPDATED_BY               
 ,LAST_UPDATE_DATE                       
 ,DISTRIBUTION_TYPE             
 ,GLOBAL_NAME       
 ,DIST_BAL_TYPE 
 ,ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT
 ,EDW_CREATE_DATETIME               
 ,ACTION_CODE                   
  FROM  $$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_LINE_DTLS 
 UNION ALL 
 SELECT  
   BATCH_ID                      
 ,ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID            
 ,ADJUSTMENT_ID                 
 ,ADJUSTMENT_ACCOUNTING_ID      
 ,ORG_ID                        
 ,APPLICATION_ID                
 ,LEDGER_ID                     
 ,CURRENCY_CODE                 
 ,EXCHANGE_RATE                 
 ,EXCHANGE_DATE                 
 ,CONVERSION_TYPE               
 ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE          
 ,GL_DATE                       
 ,AMOUNT                                    
 ,ACCOUNT_CLASS                 
 ,PERCENT_ADJ                   
 ,ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NUMBER        
 ,GL_POSTED_FLAG                                           
 ,EVENT_ID                      
 ,EVENT_TYPE                    
 ,CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
 ,SEGMENT1                      
 ,SEGMENT2                      
 ,SEGMENT3                      
 ,SEGMENT4                      
 ,SEGMENT5                      
 ,SEGMENT6                                          
 ,JE_CATEGORY_NAME              
 ,JE_SOURCE_NAME                
 ,PERIOD_NAME                   
 ,GL_POSTED_DATE                                        
 ,DESTINATION_BATCH_ID                                      
 ,GL_INTERFACE_ELIGIBLE         
 ,COGS_DEFERRAL_FLAG            
 ,COGS_REV_POSTED_DATE          
 ,COGS_REV_GL_DATE                                                                          
 ,CREATED_BY                    
 ,CREATION_DATE                 
 ,LAST_UPDATED_BY               
 ,LAST_UPDATE_DATE                       
 ,DISTRIBUTION_TYPE             
 ,GLOBAL_NAME       
 ,DIST_BAL_TYPE 
 ,ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT
 ,EDW_CREATE_DATETIME               
 ,ACTION_CODE                  
  FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_RAE_ADJSTMNT_GL_DSTRBTN) SOXRS 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON SOXRS.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
 INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_ADJSTMNT_GL_DSTRBTN SRAGD 
   ON SOXRS.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID=SRAGD.SK_SUMMARY_ID_INT  
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SRAGD.SS_CD 
 INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS_TV NSOBT 
  ON COALESCE(SOXRS.LEDGER_ID,-999) = NSOBT.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT 
   AND NSOBT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
   AND NSOBT.END_TV_DT='3500-01-01' 
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAA
  ON SOXRS.APPLICATION_ID = EFAA.APPLICATION_ID 
  AND UPPER(EFAA.APPLICATION_NAME) = 'REVENUE ACCOUNTING ENGINE'
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
   ON NGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID=SOXRS.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
    AND NGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = SOXRS.GLOBAL_NAME 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJSTMNT_GL_DSTRBTN NRAGD
  ON NRAGD.SK_SUMMARY_ID_INT=SOXRS.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
     AND NRAGD.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT  
        NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
                   ,BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE 
                   ,BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE 
                   ,BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE 
                   ,BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE 
                   ,BK_PROJECT_CODE 
                   ,NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
        MIN(NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY ) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
     FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  NGLA,  
     $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC 
     WHERE 1=1  
     AND NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
     AND NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
     AND NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE <> 'UNK'  
     AND BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE<>'UNK'  
     AND BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE<>'UNKNOW'  
     AND BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE <> 'UNKNO'  
     AND BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE<>'UNK' 
     AND BK_PROJECT_CODE<>'UNKNOW'
     GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7
     )USOBK 
   ON SOXRS.SEGMENT1 = USOBK.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
   AND SOXRS.SEGMENT2 = USOBK.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE 
   AND SOXRS.SEGMENT3 = USOBK.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE 
   AND SOXRS.SEGMENT4 = USOBK.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE 
   AND SOXRS.SEGMENT5 = USOBK.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE 
   AND SOXRS.SEGMENT6 = USOBK.BK_PROJECT_CODE 
   AND NSOBT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = USOBK.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER GL WHERE SOXRS.LEDGER_ID = GL.LEDGER_ID)
  AND SOXRS.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL
  AND COALESCE(SOXRS.GL_POSTED_FLAG, 'N') = 'Y'
